title: Ask Paris: What does the Olympic spirit mean to you? - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: As the Paris 2024 Summer Olympic Games is now in full swing, CGTN hit the streets of the French capital to find out what the Olympic spirit means to Parisians. Take a look!
